title: wrkout
description: Quick workout tracker for logging Push, Pull, and Legs sessions with less friction and better consistency.

title: Shreyan's Arc
description: Interactive roadmap that helps learners plan what to study next, track progress, and stay consistent in DSA prep.

title: J-Void
description: Java practice platform that gives learners a focused way to build confidence through hands-on problem solving.

title: WealthWise
description: Financial planning platform that helps users understand key money decisions through clear guidance and simple tools.

title: SpringMart
description: Spring Boot backend for a lightweight product catalog and e-commerce demo, with CRUD APIs, search, pagination, image handling, validation, partial updates, seeded demo data, H2 persistence, and Docker support. The frontend was built with AI tools and manually integrated with the backend, showing the ability to ship practical systems with modern development workflows.

title: Student Management System
description: Console-based Java and MySQL student administration tool with validated CRUD workflows, persistent storage, search by ID, name, or grade, and reporting features such as grade distribution, age-range analysis, summary statistics, and top-performers ranking. This project can be used for small schools, coaching centers, and demos, while also showing practical skill in Java, JDBC, layered design, validation, and SQL-based analysis.
